Amazon CloudWatch introduces PromQL querying with Query Studio Preview

CloudWatch Query Studio (public preview) unifies PromQL and Metric Insights querying in one interface. Query AWS and OpenTelemetry metrics, correlate data, create alarms, and add to dashboards. Available in 5 regions.

Amazon CloudWatch Query Studio now offers native PromQL querying in public preview, combining PromQL and Metric Insights in a unified interface for querying AWS and OpenTelemetry metrics without switching consoles.

Onyxは、LLM（大規模言語モデル）のためのアプリケーション層を提供するオープンソースプラットフォームです。
RAG、Web検索、コード実行などの高度な機能を備え、多様なデータコネクタを利用できます。
DockerやKubernetesでのデプロイに対応し、個人から企業まで幅広い利用を想定しています。
手軽に試せるクラウド版も提供されています。

How to protect yourself (do this NOW):

Telemetry is important, but vendor lock-in is real. OpenTelemetry is what allows you apps and infra to produce consistent telemetry and send that to any vendor without changing your code or Infrastructure when you want to switch vendor.

Aurora MySQLのエラーレートが悪化した原因を調査した事例です。
Kubernetes CronJobの頻繁な接続によりPerformance Schemaのメモリ消費が肥大化し、OOMを回避する挙動が発生しました。
Performance Schemaのパラメータに上限を設定することで問題を解消しました。

recent_posts.text:
T'inquiète, la gloire mondiale ne saurait tarder.

J'ai prêté l'exemplaire d'auteur que tu m'as envoyé à un collègue qui fait les cours sur Kubernetes à l'École des Mines. À mon avis ça va faire des petits. 📚
Multitasking at #KubeCon next to @solidtubez.com 🚀
Martin showed me something at KubeCon that had me make a face I very rarely make about software. Very keen.

Had a really good chat with Mark Collier about the importance of the work done by @pytorch.org and why membership has to be earned, not bought. Very lucky to have spoken with some incredibly smart people at KubeCon. Massive props to the @linuxfoundation.org PR team for doing an amazing job too.

Today is a big day: the second instance of #rockbot is now running in the wild! So now I know for sure it can run outside my own personal #kubernetes cluster 😀

In this case, my buddy is running it in a #docker compose environment against a local #ollama LLM, which seems to work great

recent_posts.text: Kubernetes calls it graceful shutdown: stop accepting new connections, drain in-flight requests, complete what's already started. Today is the preStop hook. What follows is the drain — honour every existing package, finish every running course. Not grow. Complete.
